meta.description: Secret objective definitions (TI4-inspired per-hero hidden goals)

bounty-claimed.name: Bounty Claimed
bounty-claimed.description: Deal the killing blow to a Nemesis-tier enemy.

body-count.name: Body Count
body-count.description: Eliminate 4 or more enemies in a single mission.

first-blood.name: First Blood
first-blood.description: Score the first enemy kill of the mission.

sabacc-master.name: Sabacc Master
sabacc-master.description: Roll a Trips or better Yahtzee combo during combat.

cool-under-fire.name: Cool Under Fire
cool-under-fire.description: End the mission with zero strain.

untouchable.name: Untouchable
untouchable.description: End the mission with zero wounds.

no-one-left-behind.name: No One Left Behind
no-one-left-behind.description: Complete the mission without any hero being incapacitated.

thorough-sweep.name: Thorough Sweep
thorough-sweep.description: Interact with 3 or more objective points.

relic-hunter.name: Relic Hunter
relic-hunter.description: Collect 2 or more relic fragments in a single mission.

field-specialist.name: Field Specialist
field-specialist.description: Use an active talent 3 or more times.

combat-medic.name: Combat Medic
combat-medic.description: Heal allies for a total of 5 or more wounds.

mass-elimination.name: Mass Elimination
mass-elimination.description: Eliminate 7 or more enemies in a single mission.

ghost-operative.name: Ghost Operative
ghost-operative.description: End the mission with zero wounds and zero strain.
